title: confispawn
description: The ultimate configure panel for your spawners!
body:
# 👍 My other projects:

Also Check Out my other projects at [theblackswitch.com](https://theblackswitch.com/)!

---

![the logo](https://theblackswitch.com/assets/images/confispawn_logo.png)
# 📝Pack Explanation:
Welcome To Confispawn!
﻿﻿Confispawn is a datapack which allows you to configure your spawner!!
Just Type /trigger confispawn while looking at a spawner and bam, You now have acces to all configs vanilla minecraft offers from entity spawn range to max spawn count, literaly everything!

This allows you to change:
- The distance a player needs to be from the spawner in order to activate it
- The max distance entities can spawn from the spawner
- The max amount of entities that can spawn a once
- The max amount of entities that can be present at once
- The max delay between spawns
- The min delay between spawns

But ofcorse you cannot just increase the spawn count to 5-million because that would just crash your world, So the operator can change the limits of every setting!

This pack also works in survival. When uninstalling the pack, all modified spawners keep their settings.

## The Config Menu:
![the config menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6RwR5Ldd/images/7d358f310b08f5234d3aab11585a81a6967cf693.png)


﻿I hope you like my pack and happy Configurating!
